name: Nyfosa AB (publ)
summary: Nyfosa AB (publ), a real estate company, acquires, manages, improves, and sells various properties in Sweden. Its property portfolio includes offices, logistics, and warehouse properties. As of June 30, 2020, the company had properties with a leasable area of 2,231 thousand square meters. Nyfosa AB (publ) is based in Nacka, Sweden.
